code:
import io
import string
import list

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = sorted.len()
  mut inserted = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let current = match sorted.get(i)
      when Some(v) v
      when None 0
    end
    if not inserted and x <= current
      result = list.push(result, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, current)
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn sort_unique(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let x = match xs.get(i)
      when Some(v) v
      when None 0
    end
    if not list.contains(result, x)
      result = insert_sorted(result, x)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn parse_line(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  let n = parts.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let part = match parts.get(i)
      when Some(s) s
      when None ""
    end
    match string.parse_int(part)
    when Some(num)
      nums = list.push(nums, num)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  nums
end

fn join_ints(_ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  let n = xs.len()
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let x = match xs.get(i)
      when Some(v) v
      when None 0
    end
    if i == 0
      result = "#{x}"
    else
      result = "#{result} #{x}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
    when Some(s) s
    when None ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
    when Some(s) s
    when None ""
  end
  let nums1 = parse_line(line1)
  let nums2 = parse_line(line2)
  mut combined: List<Int> = nums1
  let n2 = nums2.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n2
    let x = match nums2.get(i)
      when Some(v) v
      when None 0
    end
    combined = list.push(combined, x)
    i = i + 1
  end
  let result = sort_unique(combined)
  println(join_ints(result))
end
